meanings.definition: prepare (oneself) for something unpleasant or difficult
support or hold steady and make steadfast, with or as if with a brace
examples: brace your elbows while working on the potter's wheel

meanings.definition: cause to be alert and energetic
positioned so as to be ready for confrontation or danger
examples: he stood to attention with his shoulders braced

meanings.definition: held up by braces or buttresses
